research_metadata.expected_effect: Changes only the regression estimator family to a minimal neural quantile forecaster.
research_metadata.hypothesis: A tiny PatchTST sequence forecaster may capture short ETHUSD h24 temporal structure while keeping the trial_0041 target, features, gates, and backtest contract.
research_metadata.leakage_note: Feature values are causal at t; targets are future-only labels and are excluded from model.feature_cols. Screening rankings never read folds 10-16.

strategy.description: ETHUSD 30m v3.4-derived hybrid Ehlers trend replacement experiment. Target, signal gates, risk, and backtest logic stay unchanged. The model keeps the strongest long-horizon EMA trend context while replacing redundant EMA ratio features with normalized Ehlers trend/cycle features.
strategy.name: ethusd_30m_lightgbm_h24_structured_tail_alpha_v3_7_ehlers_trend_hybrid

runtime.pythonhashseed_note: PYTHONHASHSEED set at runtime affects child processes, not hash seeding of current process.
